# Update: X3.51
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Update%3A%20X3.51&prop=wikitext

Patch X3.51!

New:
 Epic monsters will now drop EPIC dungeons, where all of the monsters in the dungeon will be EPIC.
 More potion drops have been added to improve legion farming. Still a grind, though!
 Accounts with 2FA enabled get doubled EXP gains.
Bugfixes:
 Various chat colors have been fixed.
 Trading has been re-enabled.
Updated:
 2FA is only required after 24h from the last login, or if you login at a new location.
 All monsters can now be epic.
 The final Necrop secret now drops the correct items.
